title: Intense Dense Italian Eggplant Ossobuco
description: A rich and flavorful Italian dish featuring eggplant, pecorino, and a dense, monsoon-inspired sauce, served in a ramekin and vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the eggplant slices to the skillet and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the tomato sauce, pecorino cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked eggplant slices to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the eggplant mixture to a ramekin and top with additional pecorino cheese.
Bake the ossobuco in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the ossobuco from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh basil.
Serve the ossobuco hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
